arabic text: بِسْمِ اللَّهِ الرَّحْمَٰنِ الرَّحِيمِ
english translation text:
In the Name of Allah, the All-beneficent, the All-merciful.
Nuh – Noah

arabic text: إِنَّا أَرْسَلْنَا نُوحًا إِلَىٰ قَوْمِهِ أَنْ أَنذِرْ قَوْمَكَ مِن قَبْلِ أَن يَأْتِيَهُمْ عَذَابٌ أَلِيمٌ
english translation text:
Indeed We sent Noah to his people, [saying,] ‘Warn your people before a painful punishment overtakes them.’
Nuh – Noah

arabic text: قَالَ يَا قَوْمِ إِنِّي لَكُمْ نَذِيرٌ مُّبِينٌ
english translation text:
He said, ‘O my people! Indeed, I am a manifest warner to you.
Nuh – Noah

arabic text: أَنِ اعْبُدُوا اللَّهَ وَاتَّقُوهُ وَأَطِيعُونِ
english translation text:
Worship Allah and be wary of Him, and obey me,
Nuh – Noah

arabic text: يَغْفِرْ لَكُم مِّن ذُنُوبِكُمْ وَيُؤَخِّرْكُمْ إِلَىٰ أَجَلٍ مُّسَمًّى ۚ إِنَّ أَجَلَ اللَّهِ إِذَا جَاءَ لَا يُؤَخَّرُ ۖ لَوْ كُنتُمْ تَعْلَمُونَ
english translation text:
that He may forgive you some of your sins and respite you until a specified time. Indeed when Allah’s [appointed] time comes, it cannot be deferred, if you know.’
Nuh – Noah

arabic text: قَالَ رَبِّ إِنِّي دَعَوْتُ قَوْمِي لَيْلًا وَنَهَارًا
english translation text:
He said, ‘My Lord! Indeed, I have summoned my people night and day
Nuh – Noah

arabic text: فَلَمْ يَزِدْهُمْ دُعَائِي إِلَّا فِرَارًا
english translation text:
but my summons only increases their evasion.
Nuh – Noah

arabic text: وَإِنِّي كُلَّمَا دَعَوْتُهُمْ لِتَغْفِرَ لَهُمْ جَعَلُوا أَصَابِعَهُمْ فِي آذَانِهِمْ وَاسْتَغْشَوْا ثِيَابَهُمْ وَأَصَرُّوا وَاسْتَكْبَرُوا اسْتِكْبَارًا
english translation text:
Indeed whenever I have summoned them, so that You might forgive them, they would put their fingers into their ears and draw their cloaks over their heads, and they were persistent [in their unfaith], and disdainful in [their] arrogance.
Nuh – Noah

arabic text: ثُمَّ إِنِّي دَعَوْتُهُمْ جِهَارًا
english translation text:
Again I summoned them aloud,
Nuh – Noah

arabic text: ثُمَّ إِنِّي أَعْلَنتُ لَهُمْ وَأَسْرَرْتُ لَهُمْ إِسْرَارًا
english translation text:
and again appealed to them publicly and confided with them privately,
Nuh – Noah

arabic text: فَقُلْتُ اسْتَغْفِرُوا رَبَّكُمْ إِنَّهُ كَانَ غَفَّارًا
english translation text:
telling [them]: ‘‘Plead to your Lord for forgiveness. Indeed, He is all-forgiving.
Nuh – Noah

arabic text: يُرْسِلِ السَّمَاءَ عَلَيْكُم مِّدْرَارًا
english translation text:
He will send for you abundant rains from the sky,
Nuh – Noah

arabic text: وَيُمْدِدْكُم بِأَمْوَالٍ وَبَنِينَ وَيَجْعَل لَّكُمْ جَنَّاتٍ وَيَجْعَل لَّكُمْ أَنْهَارًا
english translation text:
and aid you with wealth and sons, and provide you with gardens and provide you with streams.
Nuh – Noah

arabic text: مَّا لَكُمْ لَا تَرْجُونَ لِلَّهِ وَقَارًا
english translation text:
What is the matter with you that you do not look upon Allah with veneration,
Nuh – Noah

arabic text: وَقَدْ خَلَقَكُمْ أَطْوَارًا
english translation text:
though He has created you in [various] stages?
Nuh – Noah

arabic text: أَلَمْ تَرَوْا كَيْفَ خَلَقَ اللَّهُ سَبْعَ سَمَاوَاتٍ طِبَاقًا
english translation text:
Have you not seen how Allah has created the seven heavens in layers,
Nuh – Noah

arabic text: وَجَعَلَ الْقَمَرَ فِيهِنَّ نُورًا وَجَعَلَ الشَّمْسَ سِرَاجًا
english translation text:
and has made therein the moon for a light and the sun for a lamp?
Nuh – Noah

arabic text: وَاللَّهُ أَنبَتَكُم مِّنَ الْأَرْضِ نَبَاتًا
english translation text:
Allah made you grow from the earth, with a [vegetable] growth.
Nuh – Noah

arabic text: ثُمَّ يُعِيدُكُمْ فِيهَا وَيُخْرِجُكُمْ إِخْرَاجًا
english translation text:
Then He makes you return to it, and He will bring you forth [without fail].
Nuh – Noah

arabic text: وَاللَّهُ جَعَلَ لَكُمُ الْأَرْضَ بِسَاطًا
english translation text:
Allah has made the earth a vast expanse for you
Nuh – Noah

arabic text: لِّتَسْلُكُوا مِنْهَا سُبُلًا فِجَاجًا
english translation text:
so that you may travel over its spacious ways.’’ ’
Nuh – Noah

arabic text: قَالَ نُوحٌ رَّبِّ إِنَّهُمْ عَصَوْنِي وَاتَّبَعُوا مَن لَّمْ يَزِدْهُ مَالُهُ وَوَلَدُهُ إِلَّا خَسَارًا
english translation text:
Noah said, ‘My Lord! They have disobeyed me, following someone whose wealth and children only add to his loss,
Nuh – Noah

arabic text: وَمَكَرُوا مَكْرًا كُبَّارًا
english translation text:
and they have devised an outrageous plot.
Nuh – Noah

arabic text: وَقَالُوا لَا تَذَرُنَّ آلِهَتَكُمْ وَلَا تَذَرُنَّ وَدًّا وَلَا سُوَاعًا وَلَا يَغُوثَ وَيَعُوقَ وَنَسْرًا
english translation text:
They say, ‘‘Do not abandon your gods. Do not abandon Wadd, nor Suwa, nor Yaghuth, Ya‘uq and Nasr,’’
Nuh – Noah

arabic text: وَقَدْ أَضَلُّوا كَثِيرًا ۖ وَلَا تَزِدِ الظَّالِمِينَ إِلَّا ضَلَالًا
english translation text:
and already they have led many astray. Do not increase the wrongdoers in anything but error.’
Nuh – Noah

arabic text: مِّمَّا خَطِيئَاتِهِمْ أُغْرِقُوا فَأُدْخِلُوا نَارًا فَلَمْ يَجِدُوا لَهُم مِّن دُونِ اللَّهِ أَنصَارًا
english translation text:
They were drowned because of their iniquities, then made to enter a Fire, and they did not find any helpers for themselves besides Allah.
Nuh – Noah

arabic text: وَقَالَ نُوحٌ رَّبِّ لَا تَذَرْ عَلَى الْأَرْضِ مِنَ الْكَافِرِينَ دَيَّارًا
english translation text:
And Noah said, ‘My Lord! ‘Do not leave on the earth any inhabitant from among the faithless.
Nuh – Noah

arabic text: إِنَّكَ إِن تَذَرْهُمْ يُضِلُّوا عِبَادَكَ وَلَا يَلِدُوا إِلَّا فَاجِرًا كَفَّارًا
english translation text:
If You leave them, they will lead astray Your servants, and will beget none except vicious ingrates.
Nuh – Noah

arabic text: رَّبِّ اغْفِرْ لِي وَلِوَالِدَيَّ وَلِمَن دَخَلَ بَيْتِيَ مُؤْمِنًا وَلِلْمُؤْمِنِينَ وَالْمُؤْمِنَاتِ وَلَا تَزِدِ الظَّالِمِينَ إِلَّا تَبَارًا
english translation text:
My Lord! Forgive me and my parents, and whoever enters my house in faith, and the faithful men and women, and do not increase the wrongdoers in anything but ruin.’
Nuh – Noah
